name: Vibe-Score v3 — Suite 2 extended validation corpus
description: Hand-typed emotional vectors across seven content domains, scored against the canonical formula. Companion to fixtures/competitive-tests.json (Suite 1 reference floor). Last updated 2026-05-20.

cases.name: Investigative exposé — corporate emissions cover-up
cases.notes: Anger + disgust dominant; betrayal vibe. Should land deep negative.

cases.name: Science feature — child's first mRNA cancer cure
cases.notes: Joy + trust + anticipation; small residual sadness from cancer context.

cases.name: Op-ed on local civic decline
cases.notes: Mixed negative; same-valence emotions compound (no drag).

cases.name: Excited product launch tweet
cases.notes: Hype tweet — anticipation + surprise active. The blindness in the crude formula would miss this; canonical reads it correctly.

cases.name: Sarcastic software-bug complaint
cases.notes: Light irritation, moderate signal — sarcasm typically reads as low-intensity anger/disgust.

cases.name: Anxious career-pivot post
cases.notes: Fear + anticipation — mixed valence near center.

cases.name: Bittersweet colleague farewell note
cases.notes: Joy + sadness opposite valence + both above threshold → drag fires → score pulled toward center. The classic bittersweet case.

cases.name: Glowing 5-star customer review
cases.notes: Trust + joy dominant — the ad-revenue-adjacent case (customer reviews drive purchase).

cases.name: Angry refund-demand email
cases.notes: Pure reactive cluster — clear negative read.

cases.name: Apple — Think Different.
cases.notes: Surprise + anticipation lead. The crude formula would underrate this badly (drops surprise entirely); canonical reads it as positive-rebellious.

cases.name: Google (legacy) — Don't be evil.
cases.notes: The 'don't' framing introduces ambient negative emotion alongside the positive intent. Fear+anger compound (same valence), no drag. Near-center moderate-positive.

cases.name: Hopeful chorus — joy + trust + anticipation
cases.notes: Anthemic positive chorus. High purity, high intensity.

cases.name: Heartbreak verse — sadness-dominant
cases.notes: Classic ballad sadness. Same-valence emotions compound; no drag.

cases.name: Triumphant defiance — anger + anticipation mixed
cases.notes: Rebellion lyric energy. Anger pulls down, anticipation/joy lift. Mixed-positive read is correct.

cases.name: Nostalgic reverie — bittersweet drag
cases.notes: Joy + sadness opposite-valence both active → drag fires. The music-thesis test: nostalgia IS bittersweet.

cases.name: MLK — I have a dream (emotional signature)
cases.notes: Trust + anticipation dominant, faint sadness for the moral weight.

cases.name: Reagan — Tear down this wall (emotional signature)
cases.notes: Anticipation + trust with directed anger at the wall (not at people).

cases.name: Obama — Yes we can (emotional signature)
cases.notes: Pure constructive cluster — joy, trust, anticipation. The hope vector.
